name: Peach Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. In a pot, mix the filling ingredients; place on medium heat and allow to boil.
3. Place hot fruit in the bottom of a buttered casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg.
5. Dot with 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) butter.
6. Mix dough ingredients in a separate bowl; form into a ball.
7. Roll out dough and cover the filling with the rolled dough.
8. Dot the dough with butter and sprinkle with 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon.
9. Bake for 30 minutes at 425°F.
Apples, pears, and plums may also be used with this recipe.
